scenario: Quarterly or monthly business review for executives.
sourceRequirements: KPI table with baseline, current value, and target
growth and decline drivers by region, channel, or product
risks, opportunities, and open management decisions
next-period action plan with owner and time horizon
narrativeSkeleton: Start with the management question and one-line answer.
Separate performance variance from root causes.
Translate risks and opportunities into decision points.
qualityChecks: Every KPI states period, unit, and source.
Executive summary has no unsupported claims.
Actions include owner, deadline, and measurable target.
Risk pages distinguish fact, judgment, and recommendation.
PPTX text, shapes, charts, and speaker notes remain editable.
Optional Web Deck is checked on desktop and mobile widths.

sampleProof.notes: Synthetic sanitized business review skeleton for public demos.
